function.name: mios_kargs_validate
function.description: Validate a TOML kargs.d fragment for MiOS. Reject any TOML containing a [kargs] section header or a 'delete' sub-key. Validate that 'match-architectures', if present, is a subset of ["x86_64","aarch64"]. Files at usr/lib/bootc/kargs.d/*.toml use a flat top-level `kargs = [...]` array.

filename.description: Target filename under usr/lib/bootc/kargs.d, e.g. 10-mios-console.toml. Lexicographic ordering: 00-* runs first, 99-* last.

toml_content.description: Raw TOML content. Must define top-level `kargs = ["...", ...]`. May define top-level `match-architectures = [...]`. No section headers, no delete sub-keys.
